Letra_cifra:
Date: Tue, 30 Dec 1997 12:15:56 -0600
From: Tom Tanto

         Featuring: The Notorious B.I.G., Lil' Kim, The
 Lox,
                    Dave Grohl, Perfect, FuzzBubble, 
& Size14
        Written By: S. Jacobs, J. Phillips, D. Styles,
                    C. Wallace, K. Jones, S. Combs, 
&
                    *
>From the CD Single: "Been Around The World"
                    Featuring the Notorious B.I.G. 
& Mase
        Track Time: [4:45]
           Track #: 2
      CD Catalog #: 78612-79126-2
    Record Company: Bad Boy Records
            Tab By: the Supernau^?
                    (Eric Carroll - *)

First of all I just wanna say that, being a heavy 
metal-hard rock fan, it's
hillaroius that I'm tabbing this out, but you gotta 
admit, it's kinda
funky.  And, the video just kicks ass.  Don't ask me 
what the words are, if
anyone wants to take this down and slap the words into 
it & re-post it, be
my guest.  In fact, please do!  I'm not a rap fan, 
& I can't understand
what the hell they're saying half the time anyway.  
What's a "baller" or a
"shot-caller" or a "jimmy cap"?  I guess i'm na?ve, 
but, If anyone knows,
e-mail me.  Thanx.  My rythm and spacing isn't too 
great, but if you know
the song, you should know the rythm.  I'm just givin' 
ya the real basics,
but with a song like this, that's all you need.  Was 
Rob Zombie in the
studio with Puffy or did he just rip that off too?  If 
anybody can tell me
anything e-mail:  * Also,does anybody know who the hell
Perfect, the Lox, Size14, & FuzzBubble are?  Are 
they rap or metal or what?

*Note: There's (of course...) lots of distortion, and 
some kind
of cool delay effects goin' on here throughout the 
song.  Also,
the tuning here is standard, on the "Rock Remix II" 
they use
dropped D tuning (I think), and it's *almost* the same 
thing.
Play around with it.
